goals: Verify the persistent memory worker service is running and healthy
Search for past observations about document management interface design decisions
Retrieve detailed information about specific design-related memories
Review the timeline context around important design decisions

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and detail-oriented. Prefers efficient workflows and values clear documentation of past decisions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in document management systems and UI implementation but unfamiliar with the internal workings of the persistent memory system. Knows it captures context but does not know tool names or API details.

end_condition: The user has verified the memory system is operational, found relevant past design decisions, retrieved specific memory details, and reviewed the timeline context around key design choices.
